visual_description: Four individuals are gathered around a gurney holding a human body covered in what appears to be dried leaves or debris. One person in a white shirt and apron stands at the head of the gurney, another in a dark suit stands behind, and a third in a white shirt and tie stands at the foot. A fourth person, wearing a dark top, enters from the left and approaches the gurney while the others remain stationary.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a neutral tone and moderate pace, speaking clearly without any noticeable background noise or inflection.
